About IJLAPS

Empowering Global
Communication Through
Language Excellence

For over 15 years, IJLAPS has been transforming lives through language education. We connect cultures, open doors to international opportunities, and prepare our students for success in an increasingly connected world.

👨‍🏫

Expert Instructors

Native speakers with years of teaching experience

🌍

Global Opportunities

Visa support for overseas employment

📜

Certified Programs

Internationally recognized certifications

💰

Affordable Fees

Scholarships & installment plans available

Testimonials

What Our Students Say

"

Before IJLAPS, I was selling handmade crafts at Mama Ngina Market. Today, I work as a trade liaison between Kenyan and UAE businesses. The Arabic I learned here didn't just teach me vocabulary—it taught me how to build trust across cultures. IJLAPS didn't just change my career; it changed my entire family's trajectory.

AK

Amina Khalid

Business Professional — Dubai
"

I grew up in Kibera with big dreams but limited opportunities. IJLAPS saw potential in me when I couldn't see it myself. Their French and English interpretation program gave me the skills to stand among the world's best translators. Now I translate at UN conferences—proof that talent is universal, but opportunity is not.

DO

David Ochieng

UN Translator — Geneva
"

The Japanese program at IJLAPS was my gateway to Tokyo's tech scene. But more than the language, I learned the cultural intelligence needed to succeed internationally. My startup now bridges African and Japanese tech ecosystems. The visa support team helped me navigate every hurdle. IJLAPS prepares you to lead globally.

FM

Fatuma Mohammed

Tech Entrepreneur — Nairobi & Tokyo
"

After completing my teaching certification through IJLAPS, I returned to teach at one of Mombasa's top international schools. The TESOL program was rigorous, practical, and directly applicable. Now I'm training the next generation of global communicators right here in Kenya. IJLAPS gave me the tools to build my career at home.

JM

James Mutiso

International School Teacher — Mombasa

Join 5000+ Students Today

Empowering global communication through language excellence. Start your journey with IJLAPS and unlock a world of opportunities.
